creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Mar 20, 2014 at 10:36:16AM -0700, Joseph Benden wrote:
> I tried FreeBSD versions 10 and 11 inside a virtual machine, but was
> unable to boot a virtual machine. (I know, inception). So I installed
> 11-CURRENT on my MacBook (missing wireless drivers is a bummer; might
> have to make them) and successfully booted an Arch64 Linux virtual
> machine using the SHAR.
> 
> I did run into trouble with RI documentation. I think we should remove
> all docs from the pkg-plist and add the flags "--no-ri --no-rdoc" to the
> RUBYGEM_ARGS.
> 
> Thoughts?

What was the issue with the docs? Was it charset/encoding issues? if so, do you
have the rdoc gem installed and does the issue go away if you remove that?

Steve
